title: Provide ability to close banner on iOS
excerpt:

posts.author: scoobysnack (Christina McGuire)
posts.cookedHtml:
When away from home I use my iPad Pro - switching between the Monday iOS app and Monday.com in the browser, in order to be able to access the functionality I need.

One thing I’m unable to do however, is to get an item link. The iOS app doesn’t provide this feature, and in the browser, it is concealed by a modal encouraging users to open the iOS app! (See screenshot)

Most modals like this provide the ability for users to be able to close the modal (for example, Miro). This seems like a trivial thing to do, and it’s surprising it’s not there, given that the iOS app can’t do everything the browser app can.
